summary: BLOCK 446 (Smart Rarity Engine) and BLOCK 449 (Now Spinning Mobile Rescue) - Full testing completed. All features verified working.

issues: Nested button warning: 'Add Missing Values' button inside 'Collection Value' button - causes React hydration warning (inherited from BLOCK 442)
Nested anchor warning: variant link <a> inside record card <a> - causes HTML validation warning

critical_code_review_comments: BLOCK 446: backend/utils/rarity.py correctly implements threshold logic (Grail: ratio>20 AND have<500, Ultra Rare: ratio>=8, Rare: ratio>=3, Uncommon: ratio>=1, Common: ratio<1, Obscure: have<25 AND want<10)
BLOCK 446: POST /api/records/enrich-rarity endpoint works correctly, enriches records with discogs_id
BLOCK 446: RecordResponse model includes community_have, community_want, rarity_label fields
BLOCK 446: RarityBadge component renders correctly with data-testid='rarity-badge-{label}' format and color-coded backgrounds
BLOCK 446: Born To Die (discogs_id=3433715) correctly shows 'Common' rarity badge (gray background)
BLOCK 449: Now Spinning modal has max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto for mobile scrolling (line 401)
BLOCK 449: Post button has sticky bottom-0 z-10 classes for visibility above keyboard (line 598)
BLOCK 449: Loading state shows 'Spinning your record...' with spinning loader (line 602)
BLOCK 449: Tracklist fetch uses AbortController with 8-second timeout for error resilience (lines 173-186)
seed_data_creation: N/A - used existing test user collection data
context_for_next_testing_agent: BLOCK 446 and 449 verified. Test user (test@example.com) has 4 Collection records: Born To Die (discogs_id=3433715, rarity_label='Common'), Test, Test Album 1, TEST_WebSocket_Album. Only Born To Die shows a rarity badge. Now Spinning modal flow works: search record -> select -> pick track -> fill caption -> post. The 403 errors in console are for image CDN requests (expected). Streaming links are MOCKED.

block_449_full_flow.details: Now Spinning flow works: search 'Born' -> select Born To Die -> pick track from dropdown (12 tracks loaded) -> fill caption -> post successfully
